case_title: MEMSQL, INC. VS. THE WAY HOLDINGS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMSQL, INC. STIPULATION RE JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL (TRANSACTION ID # 60512737) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMSQL, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THE WAY HOLDINGS, LLC A FLORIDA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AFFTRACK, INC. A FLORIDA CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEMSQL, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE WAY HOLDINGS, LLC A FLORIDA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AFFTRACK, INC. A FLORIDA CORPORATION $60,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $61,350.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT** DEFENDANT'S ARE ENTITLED TO OFFSETS FOR ANY AMOUNT(S) PAID TO PLAINTIFF SINCE THE DATE OF EXECUTION OF THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DOUG ROY ISO EX PARTE TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60604937) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMSQL, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60547559) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSED PER 5-23-17 ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
